title: ochna angulata
intro: Ochna angulata, also known as the Mickey Mouse plant due to its unique flowers, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Ochna angulata include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics that are used to treat a range of health conditions.
